metadata.description: Tool catalog shared by both Glyphh and LLM for fair comparison

tools.name: Create Release Branch
tools.description: Create a release branch from main for a new version

tools.name: Run Tests
tools.description: Run the full test suite (unit, property, regression)

tools.name: Merge to Main
tools.description: Merge the release branch into main

tools.name: Create Tag
tools.description: Create and push an annotated version tag on main

tools.name: Check Workflow Status
tools.description: Check the CI/CD build and workflow status

tools.name: Cleanup Branch
tools.description: Delete the release branch after merge

tools.name: Release SDK
tools.description: Run the full SDK release flow (branch, test, merge, tag, build)

tools.name: Release Runtime
tools.description: Run the full runtime release flow (build docker image, deploy)

tools.name: Release Platform
tools.description: Run the full platform release flow (build, deploy backend services)

tools.name: Release Studio
tools.description: Run the full studio release flow (build frontend, deploy)

tools.name: Rebuild Runtime
tools.description: Rebuild the runtime docker container from scratch

tools.name: Rebuild Studio
tools.description: Rebuild the studio docker container from scratch

tools.name: Rebuild All
tools.description: Rebuild all docker containers (full docker-compose recreate)

tools.name: Restart Runtime
tools.description: Restart the runtime container without rebuilding

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Service name to show logs for

tools.name: Docker Status
tools.description: Show status of all docker containers
